center.name: Moritz Richard Schomburgk
center.summary: Moritz Richard Schomburgk是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Ocellated crake，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The ocellated crake (Rufirallus schomburgkii) is a small terrestrial species of bird in the family Rallidae that is native to the grassland and savanna habitats of Central America and South America

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The ocellated crake (Rufirallus schomburgkii) is a small terrestrial species of bird in the family Rallidae that is native to the grassland and savanna habitats of Central America and South America
